title: galeopsis leiotricha
intro: Galeopsis leiotricha, also known as purple galeopsis or purple hempnettle, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, including colds and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Galeopsis leiotricha is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in cooking and as a natural remedy in various folk medicine practices.
